# PuDrawer

## Intent

- drawer
- side panel
- non-blocking overlay

## Prefer When

- Use for secondary workflows, filters, or details that slide over the page.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for blocking confirmation; use PuModal.

## Import

```ts
import { PuDrawer } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

## Props

- `id`
- `title`
- `ariaLabel`
- `closeLabel`
- `visible`
- `height`
- `maxWidth`
- `teleportTo`
- `fullCustom`
- `showClose`
- `contentPadding`
- `closeOnOverlay`
- `lockScroll`
- `closeOnEscape`
- `zIndex`

## Slots

- `default`
- `close`
- `footer`
- `full`
- `header`
- `title`

## Events

- `update:visible`
- `close`

## Composition

- PuButton
- PuForm
- PuCellGroup
- PuPicker

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/overlay/PuDrawer.story.vue`

- Controlled
- Open State
- Custom Slots

## Types

- `PuDrawerCloseEvent`
- `PuDrawerCloseReason`

## Caveats

- Uses visible and update:visible for control; do not assume open or v-model:open.
- Use header, title, close, default, and footer slots for composed drawer interiors; fullCustom is only for whole-interior escape hatches.
- Use contentPadding=false when the slotted body owns its own edge-to-edge spacing.
